title: Device Forensics: Palo Alto — Live CLI
description: FW-DC-01 is up. Connect to the device, run real PAN-OS commands — `show config running`, `show log globalprotect`, `show log traffic` — and reconstruct the VPN-to-RDP pivot.

hints.text: `connect fw-dc-01`. You'll land at operational mode (`>`). Start with `show config running | begin authentication-profile` and compare each entry.
`show log globalprotect | include auth-success` — there's exactly one success, preceded by a flood of failures from the same source IP.
Cross-reference `show running security-policy` against the `rule=` field in the RDP traffic log entries.
